title: Problem Brief: Invalid missing trace map
problem_summary: A thin problem brief should not pass validation when it cannot point downstream automation at an explicit artifact trace map.
strategic_fit_summary: The artifact should block downstream work if traceability is missing.
why_this_problem_now: Downstream automation becomes unsafe when traceability is implied instead of explicit.
why_this_problem_for_this_segment: The target segment needs a governed handoff boundary before delivery automation continues.

problem_severity.severity_rationale: The gap affects a frequent execution workflow.

evidence_refs.justification: The research packet shows the current workflow burden.

prioritization.priority_rationale: This artifact should be blocked from downstream use until traceability is explicit.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: PM should require an explicit trace map before PRD generation.

handoff_readiness_summary: The brief is intentionally missing the trace map field.
